sources.title: Motherland | Gripping Short Film Drama | Post War Conflict | Award Winning!
sources.description:
Motherland - When a young man from Mali pays an unexpected late night visit to a Bookshop owner in England who used to live in his country, the aftermath of the violent military upheaval and Sharia Law come back to haunt them both.
2016.  Stars: Sope Dirisu, Naomi Ryan, Jason Riddington

metadata.Plot: Nesrin, an urban upper-middle class woman, goes back to her parents' old village in Anatolia to finish a novel and live out her dream of being a writer. When her conservative mother turns up uninvited and refuses to leave, Nesrin's writing stalls and her fantasies of village life turn bitter. The two woman are forced to confront the darker corners of each other's inner worlds.
metadata.Actors: Esra Bezen Bilgin, Nihal G. Koldas, Semih Aydin
